text_jp:
他愛もない…それで世紀王とは笑わせる
この力…我こそが創世王に相応しい…{END}
text_en: Pathetic… And you call yourself Century King? With this power… I alone am fit to be Creation King…{END}

text_jp: く…負けるわけには…いかないんだ{END}

出来損ないの人類どもが忌まわしき
光の力を宿したとしても…{END}
text_en: Even if you failed humans harbor the accursed power of light…{END}

text_jp:
闇の支配者である我には勝てん…
死ぬがいい！！{END}
text_en: you cannot defeat me, the ruler of darkness… Now die!!{END}

text_jp: お前の恐れる光の力を秘めている{END}
text_en: hold the power of light that you fear.{END}

text_jp: 闇を打ち砕く、正義の力だ！{END}
text_en: The power of justice that shatters darkness!{END}

text_jp: 我々の力を１つに集め、奴を倒すんだ！{END}
text_en: We will unite our power and defeat him!{END}

text_jp: 貴様らなど…１匹づつ捻り潰してくれるわ！{END}
text_en: I will crush you insects one by one!{END}
